about_subtitle:
Award-winning motion graphics designer with 3 years of experience crafting 2D animations that elevate brand identity and drive genuine audience engagement.

Specialized in visual storytelling for marketing, social media, and influencer campaigns, with proven ability to transform abstract ideas into compelling visuals that resonate across platforms.

Digital arts instructor at DECI initiative and media production influencer, constantly pushing creative boundaries.
